raw_consumer_statement:
I was misled by the jewelry department during Christmas of 2024. I was told there was a special, that I would only be charged {$80.00} a month for XXXX months. Instead, I was charged the full amount thus over-extending my credit. When I got my statement and learned that I did not even have the credit limit available to purchase full price. I called Macy 's to learn that without my knowledge they increased my spending limit. 

I lost my job and knew I could not pay, so I contacted Macys to see what could be done. They closed my account with a balance listed. 

Although I have XXXX Macy 's accounts, they have locked the other one, even though there are funds available, and it is not closed. 

I do not believe I should be held responsible, when the store took it upon themselves to increase my limit without my approval. Now I am stuck with this debt.
